test-method.name: createUser_emptyName_apiRespondsWithinSla
test-method.description: Create user with empty name — API responds

test-method.name: createUser_nullName_apiRespondsWithinSla
test-method.description: Create user with null name — API responds

test-method.name: deleteUser_nonExistentId_respondsWithinSla
test-method.description: Delete non-existent user responds within SLA

test-method.name: createUser_withFullPayload_returns201AndAssignsId
test-method.description: POST /users with full payload returns 201 with id assigned

test-method.name: createUser_withMinimalPayload_returns201
test-method.description: POST /users with minimal payload (name only) returns 201

test-method.name: updateUser_withValidPayload_returns200
test-method.description: PUT /users/{id} full update returns 200 with updated fields

exception.message: [Response time 3373ms exceeded SLA threshold of 3000ms] Expecting actual: 3373L to be less than: 3000L
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: [Response time 3373ms exceeded SLA threshold of 3000ms] Expecting actual: 3373L to be less than: 3000L at com.vinoth.automation.utils.ResponseValidator.responseTimeLessThan(ResponseValidator.java:131) at com.vinoth.automation.utils.ResponseValidator.respondsWithin(ResponseValidator.java:139) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:443) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runSequentially(SuiteRunner.java:437) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.privateRun(SuiteRunner.java:397) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.run(SuiteRunner.java:336) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.runSuite(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:52) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.run(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:95) at test-method.name: getMultipleUsers_eachReturns200
test-method.description: GET /users/{id} for multiple IDs returns correct data

test-method.name: getUserById_returns200WithValidSchema
test-method.description: GET /users/1 returns correct user with valid schema

test-method.name: deleteUser_responseBodyIsEmpty
test-method.description: DELETE /users/{id} response body is empty or {}

test-method.name: updateUser_withFullPayload_returns200
test-method.description: PUT /users/{id} full update returns 200 with updated fields

param.value: PostRequest(userId=1, title=Introduction to API Testing, body=API testing is a type of software testing that validates Application Programming Interfaces.)
PostRequest(userId=1, title=RestAssured Best Practices, body=RestAssured is a powerful Java library for testing REST APIs with a fluent DSL.)
PostRequest(userId=2, title=TestNG Parallel Execution, body=TestNG supports parallel test execution at suite, test, class, and method levels.)

test-method.name: getPostById_returnsExpectedPost
test-method.description: GET /posts/{id} returns correct post for id=1

test-method.name: deletePost_nonExistentId_respondsWithinSla
test-method.description: DELETE non-existent post responds within SLA

test-method.name: getPostsByUserId_invalidUser_returnsEmptyOrError
test-method.description: GET posts with invalid userId — API responds
